DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative rulign as follow: DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, first cause of action CC 2923.5; second cause of action sustain with leave to amend; third and fourth causes of action sustain with leave to amend to allege reasonable diligence showing tolling of statute of limitations and required particularity; fifth cause of action sustain with leave to amend to allege contractual relationship at time of wrong doing. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Continued To May-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to May 17, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. to be heard in department 501. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date to department 501. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. A First Amended Complaint was filed February 21, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Mtn To Postponse A Non Judicial Foreclosure
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hakop Keshishyan, Esq., Nick Pacheco Law Firm, APC, 1-888-888-8641, appearaing by Courtcall for plaintiff and moving party Alfanso Haro. Alison Lippa, Attorney at Law, 415-675-3400, for defendant and opposing party Bank of America

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Alfonso Haro's motion to postpone a non judicial foreclosure is granted. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.

Mtn To Postponse A Non Judicial Foreclosure
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Jan-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff Alfonso Haro's Motion to Postpone a Non Judicial Foreclosure is continued to 1/13/12. Moving party to provide court with courtesy copy of plaintiff's declaration filed on 12/22/11 if any and courtesy copy of reply. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.
